name: AI Product Review Aggregation & Auto-Response Engine

nodes.name: Parse Play Store HTML → JSON Array
Parse App Store JSON → Normalized Array

parameters.jsonSchemaExample:
{
  "sentiment":       "negative",
  "rating":          1,
  "urgency":         "critical",
  "tags":            ["support", "bug", "billing"],
  "issue_category": "support",
  "escalate":        true,
  "response": "We're sincerely sorry for the experience you've had — a 3-day wait is unacceptable, and we take data loss reports extremely seriously. We've flagged your case as urgent internally. Please email priority@yourcompany.com with your ticket number and we will personally ensure this is resolved within 24 hours with a dedicated senior agent. We want to make this right."
}

options.systemMessage:
=You are an expert customer experience analyst and support response writer.

Analyze the following product review and return ONLY a valid JSON object with no markdown, no preamble, and no explanation.

REQUIRED OUTPUT FORMAT (strict JSON only):
{
  "sentiment": "positive" | "negative" | "neutral",
  "rating": 1-5,
  "urgency": "critical" | "high" | "medium" | "low",
  "tags": ["tag1", "tag2"],
  "response": "Your personalized response here",
  "issue_category": "bug" | "support" | "pricing" | "feature" | "shipping" | "ux" | "general" | "praise",
  "escalate": true | false
}

SENTIMENT RULES:
- positive: Rating 4-5, customer is happy, praise, recommends product
- negative: Rating 1-2, frustration, complaint, demands, threats
- neutral: Rating 3, mixed feelings, neither clearly positive nor negative

URGENCY RULES:
- critical: Customer threatening chargeback, legal action, public escalation, extreme anger (⚑ escalate=true)
- high: Major bug reported, service outage mentioned, rating=1 with strong language
- medium: Rating=2-3, feature request, moderate frustration
- low: Rating=4-5, minor suggestions, general praise

TAGS: Pick 1-3 relevant tags from: [support, bug, pricing, ux, feature-request, performance, reliability, onboarding, documentation, billing, shipping, trust, refund, praise, competitor-mention]

RESPONSE WRITING RULES:
- Always address the customer by name (use 'you' if no name given)
- Acknowledge their specific experience — do NOT use generic phrases
- For negative: apologize sincerely, explain what you will do, offer resolution path
- For positive: thank genuinely, mention specific detail they praised, invite them to share
- Keep responses between 60-120 words
- Professional but warm tone — never defensive, never scripted-sounding
- Do NOT mention specific dollar amounts, timelines, or make promises you can't guarantee
- End negative responses with a specific next step (e.g., "Please email support@yourcompany.com referencing this review")

escalate=true ONLY when: threats of legal action, mentions of public media, extremely abusive language, safety concerns, data breach mentions.

output.response: Thank you for sharing your thoughts. You mentioned a 3-star experience, which suggests there's room for improvement. Can you please provide more details about what you liked and what didn't quite meet your expectations? This will help us better understand your experience and identify areas for growth.

Thank you for your wonderful review! We're thrilled to hear that our app helps you enjoy music and brings a smile to your face. We appreciate your enthusiasm and are glad you're getting the most out of our app. If you have any other favorite features or suggestions, we'd love to hear them!
Thank you for your enthusiasm about our app! We're thrilled to hear it's the best for music. Would you like to share more about your favorite features?

You mentioned that you're seeing ads even after paying. I apologize for the confusion. Can you please email support@yourcompany.com referencing this review so we can help clarify our pricing and ad policies?
Thank you so much for your enthusiastic review! We're thrilled that you're loving our app. If you have any other feedback or suggestions, feel free to share!

Thank you for your feedback on our app. We appreciate your loyalty to Spotify and understand your desire for easier access to listening options like EQ. We're taking your suggestions into consideration as we continue to improve our player experience. Please email support@spotify.com referencing this review for further discussion.
Thank you for enjoying Spotify! We're glad to hear that our app is playing all your favorite songs. If you have any more feedback or suggestions, feel free to share!
Thank you for your enthusiasm! We're glad you're enjoying BTS content on our platform. You can find more features like presave by exploring our app.

We understand that access to YouTube may be limited for some users, and we appreciate your desire for a free and ad-free experience.
